items.name: Gold 2000s Cheetah Leopard McBling Gyaru Necklace
items.description:
More recolors in group = https://www.roblox.com/communities/14477611/Laveys-Couture

Drenched in 2000s luxury, the Gold 2000s Cheetah Leopard McBling Gyaru Necklace is a fierce statement piece for true trendsetters. Imagine strutting through Shibuya, your vintage glam necklace catching every flash of the city lights. With bold cheetah and leopard print accents, this McBling masterpiece radiates untamed energy, dripping in sparkles and opulence. A nod to the golden age of gyaru fashion, this necklace is made for those who live life loud, bold, and glammed to perfection.
